findings.evidence: `nl` shows lines 30 and 36-40 manufacture `Group.FG G` from `S` and prove the rank comparison; Mathlib has `Subgroup.finiteIndex_range_powMonoidHom_of_fg` at `Mathlib/GroupTheory/FiniteAbelian/Basic.lean:199` under `[Group.FG A]`, and `Group.rank`/`Group.rank_le` are the standard quantitative FG API in `Mathlib/GroupTheory/Rank.lean:33-39`.
findings.fix: Add a general theorem such as `theorem index_range_powMonoidHom_le_rank {G} [CommGroup G] [Group.FG G] {n} (hn : 0 < n) : (powMonoidHom n : G →* G).range.index ≤ n ^ Group.rank G`, then derive the current `...of_closure_eq_top` theorem using `Group.rank_le hS`.
findings.issue: The quantitative power-map bound is stated only with an explicit finite generating set `S`, although the proof first reduces to `Group.rank` and Mathlib’s nearby qualitative API is under `[Group.FG A]`.

summary: The number-field target is at the roadmap level, but the abstract API skips the standard finitely-generated rank formulation and only exports the explicit-generating-set corollary.
